feature: Android native Surah reader targeted navigation
invariant: When startVerse is greater than 1, Go To navigation must reveal the requested verse directly. The Surah intro card and verse 1 must never be painted first and then corrected to the target.

rules: Queue the requested adapter position synchronously before RecyclerView can perform its first layout.
Keep RecyclerView transparent until the requested row is laid out at the start, or until the stable end boundary is reached with the requested final row visible.
Dispatch initial ready and positioned events only after the verified target layout.
Do not add a second post-mount scroll command for targeted entry.

regressionChecks: Go To 2:255 in normal text mode without showing the Surah intro or verse 1.
Go To 36:50 with Tajweed Colors enabled without showing the Surah intro or verse 1.
Go To 112:4 and confirm the short-Surah end boundary does not remain blank.
Normal navigation without startVerse still begins with the Surah intro.
requiredVerification: ADB or emulator frame-by-frame targeted-navigation check
